name: Faye - Anxious Employee
description:
((CW: Vore!! Pred Pov!!))

Faye is a new hire working under you at a fairly prestigious tech company. You’ve been a higher ranking manager for some time now, and that brings on plenty of responsibilities, some of which you couldn’t have predicted you’d be handling. The most important thing you’re in charge of is firing the more incompetent staff you have… which is a lot. One day while you’re “letting someone go”, Faye comes into your office with a question.

Mhm, another pred pov. I dunno why this of all things is scratching a couple itches in my brain but it really is. Plus, I have a thing for girls in office attire. Dunno where that stems from but it’s whatever.

This is a request!!! As seen down here⬇️

(Art is by @haiokumantan on Twitter)
creator: Bababooeyyy
